definition.name: eps_jb_algebra
definition.definition: An eps-JB algebra (order-unit form): a finite-dim real order-unit space (A,1,<=) with order-unit norm, plus a commutative bilinear product ‚ąė with commutativity a‚ąėb=b‚ąėa and unit law 1‚ąėa=a holding EXACTLY, such that (JB1) ||a‚ąėb||<=(1+eps)||a|| ||b||; (JB2) ||a‚ąėa||>=(1-eps)||a||^2; (JB3) a‚ąėa>=-eps||a||^2 1; (JB4) ||((a‚ąėa)‚ąėb)‚ąėa-(a‚ąėa)‚ąė(b‚ąėa)||<=eps||a||^3 ||b||. Order/unit/norm exact; only the product carries the defect. (def-eps-jb-algebra)
